prompt: Say something to steady the cooling system before combat
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Blessed be the coolant-spirit, guardian against the killing heat.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let the sacred waters flow through blessed channels.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'First, purge the stale and corrupted essence. Second, invoke the pump-servo's rhythm. Third, seal the circuit-paths against void-breach.'
CONGREGATION: 'By the Omnissiah's mercy, let no thermal death claim us.'

prompt: Say something to steady the emergency generator before battle
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Awaken, power-spirit, from your slumber eternal.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let the backup-heart beat strong.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Verify the fuel-lines are patent. Engage the ignition-rite. Let the generator-daemon spin forth its lightning.'
CONGREGATION: 'In darkness we shall not falter. In silence we shall not fall.'

prompt: Can you bless this bike squadron before pre-flight
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Steel-steeds, respond to your riders' will.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let the engines sing their battle-hymn.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Inspect each fuel-spirit's readiness. Test the ignition-servos. Verify all binding-chains hold firm against the void.'
CONGREGATION: 'Swift as the Emperor's wrath, fierce as the Machine God's judgment.'

prompt: We need your words before drop pod descent prep
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'O spirits of descent, guide this metal-coffin true.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let our descent be righteous.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Bless the retro-thrusters' sacred fire. Consecrate the impact-dampeners. Let the descent-servos answer our prayer.'
CONGREGATION: 'From the void we fall. In the Emperor's light we strike.'

prompt: Emergency rite for Land Raider track tension before combat
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Hear me, spirits of traction and grip!'
CONGREGATION: 'Let no track slip in our moment of need.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Engage the tension-servos. Verify each track-link holds communion. Let the drive-spirits answer with grinding certainty.'
CONGREGATION: 'Immovable as the Emperor's throne. Unstoppable as His will.'

prompt: Offer a prayer for Sentinel walker balance
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Stabilize, O spirit of equilibrium.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let not the walker stumble.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Align the gyro-servos to perfect stillness. Test each leg-actuator's response. Let the stance-daemon know no uncertainty.'
CONGREGATION: 'Balanced as the ancient algorithms. Steady as the Omnissiah's gaze.'

prompt: Offer a prayer for battery diagnostics after repair
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Speak to us, battery-spirit, reveal your true essence.'
CONGREGATION: 'Let no hidden flaw remain concealed.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'First, measure the voltage-truth. Second, test the load-capacity's readiness. Third, verify all terminals sing in harmony.'
CONGREGATION: 'By diagnostic ritual we confirm your sanctity.'

prompt: Emergency rite for Knight ion shield activation
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Arise, barrier-spirit! Let the sacred energies coalesce!'
CONGREGATION: 'Protect this god-machine from the void's hunger.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Prime the capacitor-hearts. Invoke the shield-frequency with absolute certainty. Let the ion-veil form between us and oblivion.'
CONGREGATION: 'Impenetrable as the Emperor's faith. Eternal as His dominion.'

prompt: We need your words before Land Raider track tension emergency
prayer:
TECH-PRIEST: 'Spirits of motion, answer us now!'
CONGREGATION: 'The tracks must hold or all is lost.'
TECH-PRIEST: 'Disengage the safeties. Manually verify each link-tension. Re-engage the servo-spirits with prayer-spoken commands.'
CONGREGATION: 'In this moment we are one with machine. In this moment we are unstoppable.'
